terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By participating in this competition, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.
terms.introText:
This competition is organized by (Name of the authorized agent/distributor in the Arab Republic of Egypt).
The competition is promoted through participating Moussy products included in the campaign.
Hereinafter referred to as the "Promoter".
terms.eligibilityText: The competition is available only within the Arab Republic of Egypt and applies to all participating Moussy products available in the market during the campaign period.
terms.periodText:
Competition Start Date: **/**/****
Competition End Date: **/**/****
Participation is valid only during the competition period, and any entries submitted outside this period will not be accepted.
terms.howText:
1. Purchase one of the participating Moussy products included in the campaign.
2. Find the code located inside the package.
3. Submit the code by registering through: wingoldwithmoussy.com
You will receive a message confirming your participation result and prize type in case of winning.
terms.prizesText:
The competition is open to residents of the Arab Republic of Egypt who are 18 years of age or older.
Participants must provide a copy of their national ID card and proof of completed registration in the application.
Winners must collect their prizes in person at the location specified by the organizer within a period of no less than 45 days from the date of winner notification.
terms.drawText: The winner shall bear sole responsibility for any additional costs, taxes, or fees arising from receiving the prize.
terms.redeemText:
The organizer reserves the right to request any additional documents required to verify eligibility. Failure to provide such documents within the specified timeframe will result in automatic cancellation of the win.
The prize must be collected in person from the location specified by the organizer within a period of no less than 45 days from the date of notification.
terms.privacyText: By participating, the winner agrees to the use of their name and image in promotional materials without any additional financial compensation.
terms.disclaimerText: Employees of the organizer (sponsor), its affiliated companies, and their immediate family members are not eligible to participate in this campaign. Participating distributors, their employees, and their immediate family members are also prohibited from participation.
terms.generalText: If it is discovered that any participant belongs to one of the restricted categories mentioned above, they will be immediately disqualified and replaced by the next eligible participant in ranking.
